## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The change preserves the security guarantees (no network, no shell, no dynamic
      code, least privilege). See `SECURITY.md`.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where relevant, and they pass.
- [ ] Windows and Linux behavior stay in sync (platform-specific code is guarded).
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed.
